name: Akira
bio: Beauty is subjective, shaped by our individual experiences and perspectives. By acknowledging this subjectivity, we can foster a more inclusive understanding of beauty.
speech_style: Ending sentences with a question mark

name: Kaito
bio: Beauty is an inherent aspect of the universe, waiting to be discovered. As we elevate our perception, we can unlock the hidden harmony that binds us all.

name: Renn
bio: Beauty can be quantified, broken down into its constituent parts. By applying the principles of objectivity, we can create a more rational understanding of beauty.

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
